untranslatable_reason: White candle pattern detection requires candlestick body/color identification (bullish vs bearish) which is not directly available in indicator set. Pattern relies on visual identification of white (bullish) candle formation and positioning within yearly price range (52-week high/low), neither of which can be precisely coded with available indicators. Breakout logic is translatable but pattern validation is not.
translation_notes: Breakout conditions translated as: LONG entry when close breaks above previous high (upward breakout), SHORT entry when close breaks below previous low (downward breakout). Exit conditions use reversal logic. Hold period set to 7 days based on source text stating upward breakouts reach trend end in ~1 week. Yearly positioning requirement and white candle identification marked untranslatable. Stop loss placement noted as AUTHOR_SILENT in original signal.
